title: Align async budget contract in runtime validation prompts and checks
description: Update runtime-mcp-validation boot prompt, async task fixtures, and harness/report tests so async evaluation/report/procedure calls always include explicit budget fields (usd, wallclock_seconds, depth, tool_calls), matching execute_tactus runtime contract.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Aligned async budget contract in runtime-mcp-validation assets. Updated boot prompt and async examples to require explicit budget fields (usd, wallclock_seconds, depth, tool_calls); updated async task prompts for evaluation handle and report run docs; updated harness stub tasks to include budget payloads for async run calls; and tightened report tests to assert async prompts include required budget terms. Verification: python -m pytest spikes/runtime-mcp-validation; python -m ruff check spikes/runtime-mcp-validation/harness.py spikes/runtime-mcp-validation/test_harness_report.py
